hypothesis: In the ALP reactor simulation, coordinating a swarm of five independent LLM agents with diverse model temperatures and randomized precursor orderings under a novelty-search reward that maximizes coverage diversity of online-embedded pressure/QCM trajectories will at least double, compared to a single-agent persistence baseline, the probability of discovering within 7200 s all reaction modes present (ALD, ALE, ASD passivation of B–C, CVD co-dose, and CVD via C decomposition).
